name: Groundworkers
constructionContext: Foundation work, drainage installation, site clearance, and earthworks for new builds and extensions
scenarioIntro: You're operating a mini-digger on a foundation dig, clay sticking to the bucket, and your phone's buried under your hi-vis in the site cabin.

name: Bricklayers
constructionContext: Brickwork, blockwork, and stonework for new builds, extensions, garden walls, and restoration projects
scenarioIntro: You're three courses into a gable end, mortar drying on the board, spirit level in one hand — and your phone starts ringing from the van.

name: Scaffolders
constructionContext: Scaffold erection and dismantling for construction projects, roof works, chimney repairs, and commercial buildings
scenarioIntro: You're thirty feet up on a scaffold lift, clipping standards together, both hands occupied — and a main contractor's calling about tomorrow's job.

name: Demolition Contractors
constructionContext: Structural demolition, soft strip, site clearance, and controlled dismantling of buildings and structures
scenarioIntro: You're managing a soft strip on a commercial building, dust masks on, the crusher running outside — and a developer's trying to reach you about a tender.

name: Concrete Specialists
constructionContext: Concrete laying, screeding, power floating, formwork, and specialist finishes for foundations, floors, and structural elements
scenarioIntro: You're power floating a warehouse floor, the concrete setting faster than expected in the heat, and your phone's in your coat pocket by the door.

name: Structural Steelworkers
constructionContext: Steel fabrication and erection, RSJ installation, portal frames, mezzanine floors, and structural steelwork
scenarioIntro: You're bolting a universal beam into position on a steel frame, the crane holding the load above you, and your phone's buzzing in your tool belt.

name: Underpinning Specialists
constructionContext: Foundation underpinning, subsidence remediation, structural reinforcement, and specialist foundation repair
scenarioIntro: You're excavating under a party wall in a confined space, shoring timbers in place, and a loss adjuster's been trying to reach you all morning.

name: Roofing Contractors
constructionContext: Pitched roofing for new builds, re-roofs, extensions, storm damage repair, and commercial roofing projects
scenarioIntro: You're straddling a ridge line relaying hip tiles in January wind, your apprentice passing slates up the ladder below — and a project manager's calling about next week's new-build plot.

name: Flat Roofers & GRP Specialists
constructionContext: Flat roof installation and repair using GRP, torch-on felt, single ply, EPDM, and liquid-applied systems
scenarioIntro: You're laminating a GRP roof in a narrow window before the resin kicks off, catalyst mixed, roller in hand — and your phone's going off in the van.

name: Leadworkers
constructionContext: Lead roofing, flashing installation, chimney weathering, and ornamental leadwork for heritage and modern buildings
scenarioIntro: You're bossing a lead chimney back gutter on a listed building, dressing the metal around a complex junction, and an architect's left three voicemails.

name: Cladding Contractors
constructionContext: External cladding systems including rainscreen, composite panels, timber, metal, and curtain walling for commercial and residential buildings
scenarioIntro: You're fixing rainscreen panels on a commercial facade, working off a MEWP forty feet up, and a quantity surveyor needs to discuss a variation.

name: Rendering Specialists
constructionContext: External rendering including monocouche, silicone, acrylic, and traditional sand-and-cement systems, plus external wall insulation
scenarioIntro: You're applying monocouche render to a gable end, the sun drying the topcoat faster than you can trowel it, and a homeowner's calling about a quotation.

name: Chimney Specialists
constructionContext: Chimney repairs, rebuilds, flue lining, breast removals, and specialist chimney maintenance
scenarioIntro: You're perched on top of a chimney stack repointing mortar joints, harness clipped to the ridge, and your phone's in your tool bag at the base of the scaffold.

name: Plumbing Contractors
constructionContext: Plumbing installation for new builds, renovations, commercial fit-outs, and domestic improvement projects
scenarioIntro: You're running first-fix pipework through floor joists on a new-build plot, pipe cutter in hand, and the main contractor's calling about the programme.

name: Electrical Contractors
constructionContext: Electrical installation for new builds, commercial fit-outs, rewires, and industrial projects
scenarioIntro: You're pulling SWA cable through containment on a commercial fit-out, cable drum spinning behind you, and an architect's trying to reach you about a design change.

name: Gas Installation Engineers
constructionContext: Gas installation and commissioning for new builds, boiler replacements, commercial heating, and landlord compliance
scenarioIntro: You're commissioning a boiler in a plant room, checking flue readings with the analyser, and a letting agent's calling about an urgent CP12.

name: HVAC Contractors
constructionContext: HVAC installation for commercial buildings, offices, retail, and residential heat pump systems
scenarioIntro: You're brazing refrigerant lines on a VRF system in a suspended ceiling, nitrogen purge running, and a facilities manager needs to discuss the commissioning schedule.

name: Drainage Contractors
constructionContext: Drainage installation for new builds, CCTV surveys, remediation work, and connection to mains sewers
scenarioIntro: You're laying drainage runs on a housing development, laser level set in the trench, and a developer's calling about the adoption application.

name: Security System Contractors
constructionContext: Security system installation for commercial premises, new builds, retail, and residential properties
scenarioIntro: You're programming an access control system in a server room, laptop connected to the door controller, and a property manager needs a quote for a new site.

name: Solar Panel Installers
constructionContext: Solar PV installation for domestic and commercial properties, battery storage systems, and EV charger integration
scenarioIntro: You're mounting PV panels on a south-facing roof, racking bolted down, DC cables running to the inverter below — and a homeowner's calling about a free survey.

name: EV Charger Installers
constructionContext: Electric vehicle charger installation for homes, workplaces, and commercial car parks
scenarioIntro: You're installing a smart charger on a driveway, running SWA from the consumer unit, and a fleet manager's calling about twelve charge points for their depot.

name: Plasterers
constructionContext: Internal and external plastering for new builds, renovations, extensions, and domestic improvements
scenarioIntro: You're skimming a ceiling in a new-build bedroom, plaster drying on the hawk, trowel arm aching — and your phone's going off in your toolbox downstairs.

name: Dry Liners
constructionContext: Dry lining, metal stud partitioning, MF ceilings, and specialist boarding for commercial and residential projects
scenarioIntro: You're fitting metal stud partitions on a commercial office fit-out, pneumatic gun firing, and the site manager wants to discuss a change to the floor plan.

name: Tilers
constructionContext: Wall and floor tiling for bathrooms, kitchens, wet rooms, commercial spaces, and swimming pools
scenarioIntro: You're laying large-format porcelain tiles in a wet room, notched trowel spreading adhesive, spacers lined up — and a customer's calling about their kitchen splashback.

name: Painters & Decorators
constructionContext: Interior and exterior painting, decorating, wallpapering, and specialist finishes for domestic and commercial properties
scenarioIntro: You're cutting in a ceiling line with a steady hand, paint tray balanced on the step ladder — and your phone vibrates in your back pocket.

name: Flooring Specialists
constructionContext: Floor coverings including LVT, engineered wood, carpet, vinyl, and specialist commercial flooring
scenarioIntro: You're on your knees laying herringbone LVT in a show home, adhesive open time ticking down, and a property developer's calling about three more units.

name: Joiners & Carpenters
constructionContext: First and second fix carpentry, bespoke joinery, door hanging, staircase installation, and timber frame construction
scenarioIntro: You're hanging a fire door on a commercial project, packing the hinges, chiselling the latch plate — and the quantity surveyor's calling about your interim valuation.

name: Kitchen Fitters
constructionContext: Kitchen design and installation for new builds, renovations, and domestic refurbishments
scenarioIntro: You're scribing a worktop into an out-of-square wall, jigsaw in hand, dust extraction running — and a customer who saw your work on Instagram is calling for a quote.

name: Bathroom Fitters
constructionContext: Complete bathroom installations including plumbing, tiling, and finishing for domestic and commercial projects
scenarioIntro: You're fitting a concealed cistern frame behind stud work, spirit level checking plumb, and a landlord's calling about refitting all six bathrooms in a rental block.

name: Window & Door Installers
constructionContext: Window and door supply and installation for new builds, replacements, and home improvement projects
scenarioIntro: You're lifting an aluminium bi-fold into a new extension opening, spirit level on the threshold, your mate holding the frame — and a homeowner's calling about replacement windows.

name: Suspended Ceiling Installers
constructionContext: Suspended ceiling installation for offices, retail, healthcare, education, and commercial fit-outs
scenarioIntro: You're running a ceiling grid on a busy office refurb, laser level projecting the line, tiles stacked below — and a fit-out contractor needs you for a job next week.

name: Insulation Installers
constructionContext: Thermal insulation for walls, lofts, floors, and external wall insulation systems
scenarioIntro: You're spraying cavity wall insulation through injection points along a terrace, pump running, and a housing association's calling about insulating another sixty properties.

name: Landscapers
constructionContext: Hard and soft landscaping for residential gardens, commercial grounds, and new-build developments
scenarioIntro: You're operating a plate compactor on a patio sub-base, aggregate flying, ear defenders on — and a garden designer's trying to reach you about a project.

name: Fencing Contractors
constructionContext: Domestic and commercial fencing installation, security fencing, gates, and boundary solutions
scenarioIntro: You're concreting fence posts into the ground, spirit level plumbing each one, and a facilities manager's calling about 200 metres of security fencing.

name: Driveway & Paving Contractors
constructionContext: Driveway installation, patio paving, and commercial surfacing including block paving, resin-bound, tarmac, and natural stone
scenarioIntro: You're laying block paving on a driveway, string line tight, rubber mallet in hand, sand between the joints — and a neighbour from across the road wants a quote.

name: Stonemasons
constructionContext: Stone masonry for new builds, restoration, heritage conservation, and bespoke architectural stonework
scenarioIntro: You're carefully pointing a listed building with lime mortar, matching the original profile, and a conservation officer needs to discuss the specification.

name: Tree Surgeons
constructionContext: Tree surgery, felling, pruning, stump removal, and arboricultural consultancy for residential and commercial clients
scenarioIntro: You're thirty feet up in a mature oak, rigging a heavy limb for removal, chainsaw dangling from your harness — and a homeowner's calling about a TPO application.

name: Building Contractors
constructionContext: General building and construction management for new builds, extensions, conversions, and commercial projects
scenarioIntro: You're managing three subcontractors on a loft conversion, the steel's going in today, building control arriving at two — and a prospective client's calling about a rear extension.

name: Extension Specialists
constructionContext: Home extensions including single storey, double storey, wrap-around, side return, and rear extensions
scenarioIntro: You're on site supervising a foundation pour for a rear extension, the ready-mix wagon due any minute, and a homeowner's calling about converting their garage.

name: Loft Conversion Specialists
constructionContext: Loft conversions including dormer, mansard, hip-to-gable, and Velux conversions with full structural work
scenarioIntro: You're dropping a steel beam into a loft conversion, the crane operator waiting for your signal, and a couple who saw your work on Checkatrade are calling about their Victorian terrace.

name: Shopfitters
constructionContext: Retail and commercial fit-outs including shops, restaurants, bars, salons, and office interiors
scenarioIntro: You're fitting bespoke display units in a boutique, the shop opening in three days, and a restaurant chain's procurement team needs a fit-out quote for four new sites.

name: Glazing Contractors
constructionContext: Glazing installation for commercial and residential projects including structural glazing, shopfronts, partitions, and balustrades
scenarioIntro: You're installing a structural glass balustrade on a first-floor balcony, glass panels lifted into the channel, and an architect's calling about a frameless extension.

name: Fire Protection & Sprinkler Contractors
constructionContext: Fire protection systems including sprinklers, fire alarms, passive fire protection, fire stopping, and compliance certification
scenarioIntro: You're installing fire stopping around service penetrations on a high-rise project, intumescent sealant gun in hand, and a building control officer needs to schedule an inspection.

name: Damp Proofing Specialists
constructionContext: Damp proofing, structural waterproofing, tanking, DPC injection, and damp remediation for residential and commercial properties
scenarioIntro: You're injecting damp-proof course chemical into a Victorian terraced wall, drill holes every 120mm, and a surveyor's calling about a full damp report for a property purchase.

name: Welders & Fabricators
constructionContext: Metal fabrication and welding for structural steelwork, railings, gates, staircases, and bespoke metalwork
scenarioIntro: You're TIG welding a stainless-steel handrail, welding mask down, argon flowing, both hands occupied — and an interior designer's calling about a bespoke spiral staircase.

name: Asbestos Removal Specialists
constructionContext: Licensed and non-licensed asbestos removal, surveys, encapsulation, and safe disposal
scenarioIntro: You're suited up in full RPE inside a decontamination enclosure, carefully removing AIB panels, and a demolition contractor needs an urgent R&D survey on a site starting next week.
